full_text: All right, controversial take here and slightly political, but I think murderers, when they go to prison, they shouldn't be allowed to have any toilet paper. So imagine when they get out of prison and after 30 to 50 years of serving a sentence with no TP, they have the world's worst swamp crack. So you know, you see a guy in Walmart walking like this, you know he's been through some shit, literally. Right? Yeah.
